UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile within the ZYRA system, including authentication-related identifiers and gamification statistics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity (matches Firebase Auth UID).

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system.

level.description: The current gamification level of the user.

points.description: The total gamification points accumulated by the user.

streak.description: The number of consecutive days the user has submitted a report.

achievementIds.description: References to Achievements obtained by the user.

teamId.description: Reference to the current Team the user belongs to.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a solar energy installation project managed by ZYRA.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

Cl_ID.description: The ID of the client for whom the project is being executed.

Pry_Estado.description: The current operational status of the project.

ubicacion.description: The geographical location of the project.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Operational report submitted by an employee, linked to a specific project.

projectId.description: Mandatory reference to the Project this report belongs to.

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Catálogo de inventario de insumos y herramientas.

ServiceChecklist.title: ServiceChecklist
ServiceChecklist.description: Plantilla de materiales requeridos por tipo de servicio.
